projectExperienceList: Frontend instrumentation / performance monitoring: https://github.com/hangtiancheng/swifty-sentry — swifty-sentry is a frontend monitoring SDK supporting exception capture, blank-screen detection, performance metric collection, and session replay. Captures resource load errors, JS runtime errors, unhandled promise rejections, XHR/fetch errors; tracks click events, route changes, and user behavior. Implements key-point sampling blank-screen detection to distinguish skeleton screens from real blank states. Performance module computes LCP/FCP/CLS/INP web-vitals and first-screen render time via Observer APIs. Supports session replay with rrweb + gzip, reports via navigator.sendBeacon with fetch fallback. Pub/sub architecture decouples core from plugin modules

AI Chatbot: https://github.com/hangtiancheng/swifty-chatbot — frontend in Vite, React, TailwindCSS, Jotai; tanstack-query for async state and request caching; SSE with virtual scrolling for long conversations; backend in Koa, JWT, lru-cache, Redis, MySQL with Knex parameterized queries; in-memory vector store for RAG, workflow code generation; now migrated to TUI with Ink
researchExperienceList: Research: reinforcement learning for network congestion control, multi-core parallel network simulation
